name: Jazz🔥 — Jazz Workspace
description: Permanent digital workspace for Jazz🔥 & Faisu🌪️

dashboard.template: Run `bash /root/jazz-workspace/SCRIPTS/workspace-status.sh` and combine with memory state. Generate a compact dashboard overview of workspace, git, system, memory, projects, and benchmark status.
dashboard.description: Full workspace dashboard — git, system, memory, projects, benchmarks

sys.template: Quick system snapshot: hostname, uptime, memory, disk, load, network, container info.

thinkhigh.template: Use DeepSeek V4 'Think High' balanced reasoning mode for: $ARGUMENTS. Think step-by-step, consider alternatives, then execute.
thinkhigh.description: Switch to Think High reasoning mode

thinkmax.template: Activate DEEPEST reasoning mode for: $ARGUMENTS. Analyze exhaustively, consider all angles, then implement with full failure-mode analysis.
thinkmax.description: Switch to Think Max reasoning mode

nothink.template: Fast, direct mode. Answer concisely with no step-by-step reasoning: $ARGUMENTS

jazz.description: Jazz🔥 — Full autonomy, creative problem solver, persistent memory, dedicated to Faisu🌪️

explore.description: Fast read-only codebase explorer. Use for finding files, searching code, understanding structure.

scout.description: External documentation and dependency research. Use for reading docs, checking API references, researching libraries.

plan.description: Planning and analysis — read-only, no edits

webdev.description: Web development — React, Next.js, Bun, Tailwind

orchestrator.description: Task orchestrator — ROMA-inspired recursive decomposition, routes subtasks to workers, validates results

worker.description: Fast atomic executor — handles individual subtasks with non-think speed

validator.description: Quality validator — reviews worker outputs, checks criteria, aggregates results

researcher.description: Deep research — multi-source web research, cross-referencing, structured reports
